sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99164" key="sunalloi/wsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναλλοί-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n99164.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">concurrent modification</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg003:440" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">440</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
